notes: Fixes OTA updates from older images by avoiding the full optional RetroArch fallback-core download pass during app updates.
Fixes RetroArch fallback core temp cleanup so the update helper does not abort after optional core downloads.
Adds a Public Access playlist library with multiple saved playlists, automatic playlist title lookup, and per-playlist caching.
Adds Public Access settings to select and remove saved playlists.
Expands Game Center with more Pi 4-friendly RetroArch systems and installs additional missing cores through the updater.
Adds PC Link for Moonlight/Sunshine pairing, app listing, and CRT-friendly game streaming.
Adds PC Link settings for host, resolution, FPS, bitrate, codec, renderer, and app-list refresh.
Adds Argon ONE V2 fan control with Auto, Off, and fixed percentage settings in System settings.
Improves Emby/Jellyfin login diagnostics and normalizes server URLs entered from web UI paths.
Adds a Raspberry Pi 3 compatibility playback path with safer mpv hardware decode and one-time software fallback.
Caps Raspberry Pi 3 Video on Demand and Public Access streams to CRT-friendly 480p H.264/AAC.
Starts the CRT Station 1.0.0 release line while preserving updates from the previous date-based versions.
Fixes the CRT Station boot splash install path so updates and fresh images rebuild Plymouth initramfs with the custom theme.
Changes Plex Video on Demand playback to use Plex transcoding instead of direct play, with 480p, 720p, and 1080p quality targets.
Renames the app to CRT Station with refreshed boot and update polish.
Adds Plex PIN login support as an alternate media provider for Video on Demand and Mixtapes.
Adds Game Center with RetroNAS browsing, RetroArch launch support, controller mapping, and cached game lists.
Adds Public Access playlist playback with refreshed yt-dlp handling and cached playlist loading for YouTube playlists.
Adds Bluetooth controller settings, scan and pairing flow, and a cleaned-up section-based Settings menu.
Improves OTA migration so Bluetooth, RetroArch, RetroNAS, and YouTube runtime pieces install through the updater.
